summary: Backend-only Task 15 Kaggle adapter verification completed. Targeted adapter tests and full regression suite are green; adapter remains thin and routes scoring through ACE-B core.

Validation benchmark grouping is deterministic and reproducible over fixed validation episode IDs.

rca of the issue: No issue reproduced in this run. All requested adapter behaviors and README boundary/hook-point documentation checks passed under pytest.
